FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- .evergreen/
- .github/
- build/.gitignore
- build/bottle.py
- build/fake_kms_provider_server.py
- build/future_function_templates/
- build/generate-future-functions.py
- build/generate-opts.py
- build/mongodl.py
- build/opts_templates/
- build/proc-ctl.py
- build/requirements.txt
- build/sphinx/
- docs/
- etc/
- src/common/src/bson-dsl.md
- src/common/src/mlib/ckdint.md

- src/common/tests/
- src/kms-message/

- src/libbson/fuzz/
- src/libbson/tests/
- src/libmongoc/doc/

- src/libmongoc/tests/
- src/tools/
- tools/
- .clang-format
- .gdbinit
